name: rail-id-client
description: Shared TypeScript client for the Rail-ID-Service HTTP API (rail-projects workspace).
author: Craig Nevins (Nev433)

scripts.prepare: npm run bootstrap-deps && npm run build
scripts._comment_bootstrap: npm runs prepare when a consumer installs this package via `file:` ref, BEFORE running `npm install` inside the linked directory. That means devDeps (including tsc) are not yet present and `npm run build` would fail with `'tsc' is not recognized` / `tsc: command not found`. bootstrap-deps populates node_modules with --ignore-scripts first so we don't recurse into our own prepare. Re-runs are idempotent — npm install over a populated node_modules is a no-op. Mirrors the guard in rail-nest-common / rail-ng-common.
